# Contributing

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-05 -->

## Prerequisites

| Tool | Version | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Node.js | ≥22 (see `.nvmrc`) | Use `nvm use` to switch automatically |
| npm | bundled with Node.js | Registry set to `https://registry.npmjs.org` (see `.npmrc`) |

**Note:** `.npmrc` sets `ignore-scripts=true`. This is intentional for security — it prevents npm lifecycle scripts from running on install.

## Getting Started

```bash
# Clone and install
git clone git@github.com:contentful/contentful-import.git
cd contentful-import
npm install          # source: package.json → (implicit install)

# Build (required before running tests or the CLI)
npm run build        # source: package.json → scripts.build (tsup)

# Run all tests (lint + build + unit + integration)
npm test             # source: package.json → scripts.test
```

## Development Workflow

```bash
# Unit tests only (fast — no lint or build step)
npm run test:unit              # source: package.json → scripts.test:unit

# Unit tests in watch mode
npm run test:unit:watch        # source: package.json → scripts.test:unit:watch

# Integration tests (requires MANAGEMENT_TOKEN and ORG_ID env vars)
npm run test:integration       # source: package.json → scripts.test:integration
```

## Commands

### Build

```bash
npm run build        # source: package.json → scripts.build — compile TypeScript via tsup (CJS + ESM)
npm run clean        # source: package.json → scripts.clean — delete dist/ and coverage/
```

### Test

```bash
npm test                    # source: package.json → scripts.test — lint + build + unit + integration
npm run test:unit           # source: package.json → scripts.test:unit — Jest unit tests with coverage
npm run test:unit:watch     # source: package.json → scripts.test:unit:watch — unit tests in watch mode
npm run test:integration    # source: package.json → scripts.test:integration — integration tests (needs credentials)
```

### Lint & Type Check

```bash
npm run lint         # source: package.json → scripts.lint — ESLint + tsc on lib/ and test/
npm run lint:main    # source: package.json → scripts.lint:main — ESLint + tsc on lib/ only
npm run lint:tests   # source: package.json → scripts.lint:tests — ESLint + tsc on test/ only
```

## Testing

- **Framework:** Jest (`jest.config.js`, using `ts-jest` preset)
- **Location:** `test/unit/` (unit, mirrors `lib/`), `test/integration/` (integration)
- **Run all:** `npm test`
- **Run unit only:** `npm run test:unit`
- **Run integration only:** `npm run test:integration`
- **Watch mode:** `npm run test:unit:watch`
- **Coverage:** generated automatically by `npm run test:unit` in `coverage/`

**Integration test setup:** Integration tests create and delete real Contentful spaces. They require:
```bash
export MANAGEMENT_TOKEN=<cma-token-with-org-permissions>
export ORG_ID=<contentful-organization-id>
npm run test:integration
```

## Code Style

This repo uses [Standard JS style](https://standardjs.com/) enforced via ESLint (source: `.eslintrc.js`):
- `eslint-config-standard` — base Standard rules
- `@typescript-eslint/recommended` — TypeScript-specific rules on top
- Key rules: `@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars: error`, `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any: warn`

Formatting is not separately configured (no Prettier) — Standard JS rules cover it.

## Commit Convention

This repo uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) via [`cz-conventional-changelog`](https://github.com/commitizen/cz-conventional-changelog):

```
type(scope): description
```

Valid types: `feat`, `fix`, `chore`, `docs`, `refactor`, `test`, `perf`, `ci`, `build`, `revert`

`feat!` and commits with `BREAKING CHANGE:` in the footer trigger a major version bump via semantic-release.

Examples:
```
feat(import): add support for custom transformers
fix(assets): handle embargoed asset upload retry correctly
build(deps): update contentful-management to ^12.3.1
chore: update CI workflows to Node 24
```

## Branch Strategy

- `main` — production releases. Merging here triggers a semantic-release publish to npm `latest`.
- `beta` — prerelease channel. Merges here publish to npm `beta` dist-tag.
- Feature branches — short-lived, branched from `main`. Use the commit type as a prefix (e.g., `feat/add-custom-transformers`, `fix/asset-retry`).

## Release Process

Releases are fully automated via `semantic-release` on merge to `main` or `beta`:
1. Commit types determine the version bump (`feat!` → major, `feat` → minor, `fix`/`build(deps)` → patch)
2. Changelog is updated, npm package is published, GitHub release is created
3. No manual `npm publish` or version bumping is needed

## Pull Requests

- PRs require CI to pass: build → check → integration tests (run in parallel)
- Use conventional commit format in PR titles (enforced by convention, not a hard check)
- Include a test plan in the PR description for behavior changes
- Merges to `main` use merge commits (not squash) to preserve commit history for semantic-release

## CI/CD

| Job | Trigger | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `build` | Every push | Compiles TypeScript via tsup, caches `dist/` |
| `check` | After `build` | Runs lint + type check |
| `test-integration` | After `build` | Runs integration tests against live Contentful spaces |
| `release` | Push to `main`/`beta` after all checks pass | Runs `semantic-release` — versions, publishes to npm, creates GitHub release |
| `codeql` | Schedule + push | GitHub CodeQL security scanning |

## File-Level Guidance

| Path | Notes |
|---|---|
| `dist/` | Generated by `tsup` — do not hand-edit. Regenerated on every `npm run build`. |
| `package-lock.json` | Committed. Do not delete. Used by CI for reproducible installs (`npm ci`). |
| `bin/contentful-import` | CLI binary. Contains a deprecation notice redirecting to `contentful-cli`. Update with care — this is user-visible. |
| `big-space.json` | Large test fixture (~65MB). Not published (not in `files`). Used for local testing only. |
| `lib/index.ts` | Exports both CJS and ESM via a workaround (see inline comment). Do not change the dual-export pattern without understanding the `cli-table3` / `esModuleInterop` constraint. |
| `.npmrc` | Sets `ignore-scripts=true`. Required for security. Do not remove. |
